methods.description: This method involves processing raw sequence data to analyze the microbial community structure using bioinformatics tools and statistical methods.

steps.description: Raw sequences were de-multiplexed based on barcodes.
steps.searchable_summary: de-multiplex raw sequences using barcodes

steps.description: MiSeq overhangs, primers, and barcodes were removed, and sequences were quality-checked, trimmed (maximum length adjusted to 550 bp), and aligned using Mothur.
steps.searchable_summary: remove overhangs, primers, barcodes, quality-check, trim, and align sequences using Mothur

steps.description: Chimeric sequences were removed in Mothur using the UCHIME algorithm.
steps.searchable_summary: remove chimeric sequences using UCHIME in Mothur

steps.description: Taxonomy was assigned against the SILVA reference database.
steps.searchable_summary: assign taxonomy using SILVA database

steps.description: OTU tables created in Mothur were analyzed in R using the package phyloseq.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze OTU tables using phyloseq in R

steps.description: Non-metric multidimensional scaling (nMDS) was used to visualize the separation of foraminiferal species and bacterial groups.
steps.searchable_summary: perform nMDS for visualization

steps.description: PERMANOVA test using the adonis2 function in Vegan was used to analyze significant variables.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PERMANOVA using adonis2 in Vegan

steps.description: Alpha diversity estimates were calculated using untrimmed and non-normalized data to calculate Shannon diversity and Pielou's evenness indices.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Shannon diversity and Pielou's evenness indices

methods.method_name: Sediment Processing and Extraction of Living Foraminifera
methods.description: This method describes the process of slicing sediment cores and extracting living foraminifera for microbiome analysis.

steps.description: Cores were sliced down to 5 cm depth, first 2 cm with 0.5 cm intervals, and then with 1 cm intervals.
steps.searchable_summary: slice sediment cores at specified intervals

steps.description: Subsamples of sediment were taken and stored for bacterial community analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: take subsamples for bacterial analysis

steps.description: Living foraminifera were retrieved, sieved, and picked under a microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve and sieve living foraminifera

steps.description: Foraminifera were washed and stored in RNAlater solution for DNA preservation.
steps.searchable_summary: wash and store foraminifera in RNAlater

methods.description: This method measures denitrification activity and intracellular nitrate quantity in foraminifera.

steps.description: Foraminifera were pooled and tested for denitrification activity.
steps.searchable_summary: pool foraminifera and test for denitrification

steps.description: Nitrate respiration rates were determined using N2O micro electrode.
steps.searchable_summary: determine nitrate respiration rates

steps.description: Intracellular nitrate was extracted and measured using the vanadium (III) chloride reduction method.
steps.searchable_summary: extract and measure intracellular nitrate

methods.description: This method describes the collection of sediment samples using a mini-multiple corer.

steps.description: Samples were taken with a mini-multiple corer equipped with four cores.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples using mini-multiple corer

steps.description: Cores were kept cool and transported to the laboratory for further processing.
steps.searchable_summary: transport cores to laboratory

methods.description: This method involves extracting and analyzing pore water from sediment cores for elemental and nutrient content.

steps.description: Pore water was extracted using Rhizons™ and syringes.
steps.searchable_summary: extract pore water using Rhizons and syringes

steps.description: Samples were acidified and stored for elemental analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: acidify and store samples for analysis

steps.description: Oxygen profiling was performed using an oxygen microsensor.
steps.searchable_summary: perform oxygen profiling with microsensor

steps.description: Nutrient analyses were carried out using a continuous-flow analyzer.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze nutrients with continuous-flow analyzer
